  GpuSortExec: expr=[o_year@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[o_year@0 as o_year, sum(CASE WHEN all_nations.nation = Utf8("BRAZIL") THEN all_nations.volume ELSE Int64(0) END)@1 / sum(all_nations.volume)@2 as mkt_share]
